app_release_notes: v0.14.5 - The free demo is rebuilt. It's now one clean Loadscope window that walks through every tab and your printable Pocket Range Card as polished images - no Excel windows popping up, no browser, and no macOS permission pop-ups. The Pocket Range Card now shows only the unit you actually dial (Mil or MOA) with no blank columns - this also applies to the real card you print. Plus: the demo's Print / Open Workbook buttons work even before you've imported any data. Includes the 0.14.2-0.14.4 fixes.
